'''Belleau-a-Lir''' was an island city on the planet of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], located on [[Lir Lakir]].

==History==
This city was once considered one of the world's artistic and cultural centers during the days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], prior to the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It, along with Alderaan itself, was destroyed by the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].

{{City-stub}}
